name: T.G. Metal Skeleton
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＧ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>テックジーナス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> メタル・スケルトン
desc: If a monster(s) on the field is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a "T.G." monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead. You can only use each effect of "T.G. Metal Skeleton" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) on the field is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a "T.G." monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead. You can only use each effect of "T.G. Metal Skeleton" once per turn.
eff: If a monster(s) on the field is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a "T.G." monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead. You can only use each effect of "T.G. Metal Skeleton" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
